text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 68 

MDCD_WVR_1915C_TYPE_CD 

LABEL: Medicaid — 1915(c) Waiver Type Code — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the code to indicate the type of 1915(c) waiver under which the beneficiary received 
Medicaid coverage; most recent in the calendar year. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: T-MSIS DE file 

VALUES: 06 = 1915(c) — Aged and Disabled 
07 = 1915(c) — Aged 
08 = 1915(c) — Physical Disabilities 
09 = 1915(c) —
